name: architect recommend: emits S-29 build requirements for a chosen option
command:
cat > req.json <<'JEOF'
{"pillars":{"security":[{"concern":"encryption_at_rest","driver":"data_sensitivity=regulated","source_id":"nist-800-53","grounding":"grounded"},{"concern":"audit_logging","driver":"compliance_regime=il5","source_id":"nist-800-53","grounding":"grounded"}],"reliability":[{"concern":"multi_az","driver":"criticality=mission-critical","source_id":"aws-reliability-pillar","grounding":"grounded"},{"concern":"synchronous_replication","driver":"data_loss_tolerance=seconds","source_id":"aws-rpo-rto-targets","grounding":"grounded"},{"concern":"backup","driver":"availability_tolerance=hours","source_id":"aws-rpo-rto-targets","grounding":"grounded"}],"performance-efficiency":[{"concern":"autoscaling","driver":"scale=large","source_id":"aws-well-architected","grounding":"grounded"}],"cost-optimization":[{"concern":"rightsizing","driver":"budget_posture=cost-first","source_id":"finops-framework","grounding":"grounded"}],"operational-excellence":[{"concern":"monitoring","driver":"baseline","source_id":"google-sre-book","grounding":"grounded"}]}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-recommend.sh" --requirements req.json --emit-requirements opt-cost 2>/dev/null | grep -q encryption_at_rest && echo build-reqs 1>&2
